template:
module Main where
import Control.Exception (try, SomeException, evaluate)
import System.IO (hSetBuffering, stdout, BufferMode(NoBuffering))
import Data.IORef
import Data.List (find)

memoizeWithTTL :: Eq a => Int -> (a -> b) -> IO (a -> IO b)
memoizeWithTTL ttl f = do
  cacheRef <- [[SLOT init_cache]]
  return $ \arg -> do
    (cache, count) <- readIORef cacheRef
    let newCount = count + 1
    let (newCache, shouldClear) = [[SLOT ttl_check]]
                                  then ([], True)
                                  else (cache, False)
    case [[SLOT lookup_call]] of
      Just (_, val) -> do
        writeIORef cacheRef (newCache, if shouldClear then 1 else newCount)
        return val
      Nothing -> do
        let result = f arg
        let updatedCache = [[SLOT cache_cons]]
        writeIORef cacheRef (updatedCache, if shouldClear then 1 else newCount)
        return result

main :: IO ()
main = kataMain
prompt: Pick the cache init, the TTL check, the lookup, and the cache prepend.
